description: Style Notefemella caters to every fashionista. This skirt from Femella is perfect for those who love the exotic. Pair it with a solid coloured top, a vibrant silky scarf and heeled strappy sandals, or just like our model, team it up with a feminine blouse, slim belt and peep-toe pumps.Product DetailsBlack short skirt, has a comfortable fabric waist, and has a zippered closure at the back, belt not includedMaterial and CareBlended fabricMachine wash with similar coloursDo not bleach or dry in direct sunlightUse warm iron if neededSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and waist 26") is wearing a size M
